sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shooter

special_mechanics.name: Airbike Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls airbike with left/right lateral movement, braking, and acceleration mechanics. Fixed camera position behind player similar to Space Harrier

special_mechanics.name: Boss Area Flight
special_mechanics.description: In boss areas (world 3), airbike transforms into flying ship with omnidirectional movement (all directions) instead of lateral-only

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative only. Burning Force is a third-person arcade shooter (1989 Namco arcade, 1990 Genesis port). Movement is vehicle-based (airbike/ship) rather than character platforming. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Gameplay focuses on lateral movement, acceleration/braking, and directional changes rather than jump mechanics or gravity.
